import React from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import "../styles/CrisisSupport.css"; import { Phone, MessageCircle, MapPin } from "lucide-react"; function CrisisSupport() { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
🛑

Crisis Support

You are not alone. Help is available right now.

🫁 60-Second Breathing

Inhale 4 sec • Hold 4 sec • Exhale 6 sec

This moment is hard — but it will pass.
You matter more than you know.

); } export default CrisisSupport;
